summary.reason: This stage is audit-only except clearly safe format fixes. Price, barcode, SKU and product validity issues were reported only.
summary.imageUploadReason: Binary image upload remains out of scope for this stage. Existing pending image manifest is preserved locally only.

loaderFindings.detail: wet-wipes.json is merged inside cache-bust.js and then loaded again in inquiry.js. Runtime Map merge prevents duplicate rows by id, but same SKU data can be overwritten by later load order.
loaderFindings.recommendedAction: Remove redundant wet-wipes merge from inquiry.js after confirming cache-bust.js is always loaded before script.js.

loaderFindings.detail: crocodile-products.json is merged inside cache-bust.js and then loaded again by crocodile-addon.js. Runtime Map merge prevents duplicate rows by id, but it is redundant and can cause stale overwrite risk.
loaderFindings.recommendedAction: Disable redundant crocodile addon loading or remove crocodile from cache-bust merge, keeping only one official load path.

loaderFindings.detail: you-pin-addon.js is included by index.html and also dynamically injected by inquiry.js. This can wrap app.init more than once and reload you-pin-products.json redundantly.
loaderFindings.recommendedAction: Keep index.html script tag and remove dynamic injection from inquiry.js.

loaderFindings.detail: juwei-products.json and you-pin-products.json are loaded by addon scripts, not by cache-bust.js product merge. They are still actual runtime sources and must be included in audits.
loaderFindings.recommendedAction: Leave as-is unless consolidating all product sources in one loader.

skuOverlapFindings.detail: Same SKU exists in full Yusheng catalog and wet-wipes add-on. Later load order may overwrite name/category/spec/image fields.
skuOverlapFindings.recommendedAction: Keep one canonical source or ensure identical fields before allowing overwrite. Do not change price/barcode without source confirmation.

skuOverlapFindings.detail: Same SKU exists in full Savlon catalog and wet-wipes add-on. Later load order may overwrite name/category/spec/image fields.
skuOverlapFindings.recommendedAction: Keep one canonical source or ensure identical fields before allowing overwrite. Do not change price/barcode without source confirmation.
